0.text: Peribronchial thickening in the upper lobe of the right lung

1.text: Volume loss in the upper lobe of the right lung

2.text: Structural distortion in the upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Bronchiectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung, predominantly in the medial segment

4.text: Minimal bronchiectasis in the lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in the right lung, most prominently in the upper lobe

6.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in a small area of the lower lobe of the left lung
